title: Benjamin Gorman puts Bricks & Minifigs inventory mystery under spotlight amid viral Coffeezilla LEGO controversy
summary_full: Benjamin Gorman and Crystal Law now argue that the missing inventory report is a key issue in the Salem Bricks & Minifigs dispute. While BAM maintains its position on the case, the former owners believe a complete inventory could help explain what happened after the store takeover and could become an important part of the ongoing legal fight.
